responseMessageContents.text:
## Goal
- Deploy the canonical IVX media/reels migration to production Supabase and finalize all remaining task dispositions, completing every safe production action end to end.

## Constraints & Preferences
- React Native (Expo), NOT Swift тАФ user explicitly rejected iOS native
- No hardcoded arrays, static JSON, mock files, or local device storage for tasks
- PRODUCTION_VERIFIED display requires five-point gate: real commit SHA, real deployment ID, health HTTP 200, running commit match, QA evidence
- Forbidden evidence values: AUTO-GENERATED, UNKNOWN, PENDING, PLACEHOLDER, MOCK, NARRATIVE, GENERATED, SIMULATED, ESTIMATED, ASSUMED
- Destructive tasks (mass data deletion) require explicit owner approval тАФ never auto-executed
- GitHub repo `ibb142/rork-global-real-estate-invest` is PUBLIC, pushed via Rork-managed GitHub App binding (all `ghp_` tokens revoked)
- Backend: `https://ivx-holdings-platform.onrender.com` (Render), Supabase: `https://kvclcdjmjghndxsngfzb.supabase.co`

## Progress
### Done
- **Production task store LIVE and verified** тАФ `GET /api/ivx/senior-developer/tasks` returns 60 tasks, 45 PRODUCTION_VERIFIED, 15 BLOCKED; fixed by adding `COPY logs ./logs` to Dockerfile and unblocking `.dockerignore` for `logs/audit/task-orchestrator`
- **Commit chain**: `69731cb3` тЖТ `d975b782` тЖТ `635d897d` (Dockerfile fix) тЖТ `ae137df4` (.dockerignore fix тАФ current live)
- **Render deployed `ae137df4`** тАФ bootTime `2026-07-11T04:19:43.023Z`, running commit matches GitHub HEAD, deployment_id `srv-d7t9ivreo5us73ftose0-hibernate-85c78f646c-pmx7l`
- **Backend canonical task store built and live**: `backend/services/ivx-canonical-task-store.ts` тАФ aggregates durable ledger, 5-point evidence gate, dedupe, fake exclusion
- **Backend API live**: `GET /api/ivx/senior-developer/tasks` (counts+filters+search) and `/tasks/:taskId` (blocks+events+evidence) тАФ HTTP 200 in production
- **Expo dashboard screen built**: `expo/app/ivx/senior-developer.tsx` тАФ counts row, status tabs, 13 filters, search, task cards, evidence detail modal
- **Web bundle verified**: `chat.ivxholding.com` bundle `entry-1ad59fe1тАж.js` contains "IVX IA Senior Developer" + "api/ivx/senior-developer/tasks"
- **14/14 canonical store + deploy-verify tests pass**; 831/835 backend tests pass (4 failures are sandbox-only missing `pdf-lib`/`ai`/`@supabase` modules)
- **Reels live**: `casa-rosario.mp4` HTTP 206 on landing CDN; 10 rows in `project_videos`; media cross-contamination audit clean for Perez
- **Migration runner built**: `backend/services/ivx-canonical-media-migration.ts` тАФ embedded idempotent SQL (backup тЖТ DDL тЖТ RLS тЖТ data corrections тЖТ backfill тЖТ integrity view), splits statements respecting `$$` quoting, applies via `ivx_exec_sql` RPC with service-role key, boot-time scheduled
- **Migration API built**: `backend/api/ivx-media-migration.ts` тАФ `GET /api/ivx/media-migration/status` (public read-only) + `POST /api/ivx/media-migration/apply` (confirm header required)
- **Routes registered in `backend/hono.ts`** for both media-migration endpoints
- **`server.ts` updated** тАФ `scheduleCanonicalMediaMigrationAtBoot()` called after server start
- **Media API switched to canonical tables**: `backend/api/ivx-project-engagement.ts` `handleProjectMediaGet` reads `jv_deal_media`+`jv_deal_reels` first, falls back to legacy `project_media`+`project_videos` only behind feature flag `IVX_DISABLE_LEGACY_MEDIA_FALLBACK`
- **15 blocked tasks dispositioned in ledger**: 1 тЖТ `blocked_owner_approval` (task `task-d8e11135тАж`), 14 тЖТ `cancelled_obsolete` (exact duplicates); events appended with classification, affected resource, destructive flag, rollback assessment
- **Canonical task store extended** with new statuses: `BLOCKED_OWNER_APPROVAL`, `CANCELLED_OBSOLETE` тАФ added to type union, counts, status rank, status mapping
- **Service-role credential confirmed present**: `/api/ivx/supabase/owner-action-health` returns `serviceRoleConfigured: true`, `writeCapableCredentialConfigured: true`; `ivx_exec_sql` RPC exists (anon gets 401 "permission denied" тАФ service-role required and available)

### In Progress
- **Need to commit + push + deploy** the migration runner, API endpoints, media API switch, and task store status extensions тАФ workspace has uncommitted changes at `ad32dc27` (local) vs `ae137df4` (GitHub HEAD + Render running)
- **Need to verify migration applied live** after Render redeploys тАФ check `GET /api/ivx/media-migration/status` for `status: applied` and `jv_deal_media`/`jv_deal_reels` row counts

### Blocked
- **15th blocked task requires owner approval** тАФ "Delete all user data from the production database" is destructive, irreversible, no backup exists, rollback impossible; held as `BLOCKED_OWNER_APPROVAL` pending explicit owner command
- **Expo dashboard UI not yet updated** for new status tabs (`BLOCKED_OWNER_APPROVAL`, `CANCELLED_OBSOLETE`) тАФ `seniorDeveloperTaskStoreService.ts` still has old 7-status type union; needs same extension as backend

## Key Decisions
- Migration runs at boot via service-role key through `ivx_exec_sql` RPC тАФ no manual SQL editor needed, no anon-key DDL
- Migration SQL is embedded and fixed (not request-supplied) тАФ POST apply endpoint only re-runs the same idempotent script with a confirm header
- Legacy media fallback kept but flagged with `source: legacy_fallback:тАж` response field; disable with `IVX_DISABLE_LEGACY_MEDIA_FALLBACK=true`
- Blocked task disposition: kept the latest run (most recent `createdAt`) as the canonical owner-approval request, cancelled all 14 earlier duplicates as `cancelled_obsolete`
- `jv_deals` uses TEXT ids (`perez-residence-001`, `casa-rosario-001`, `JV-202603-5190`) but `project_media`/`project_videos` use UUID `project_id` тАФ all legacy media rows are orphans; new tables use TEXT FK to `jv_deals(id)`

## Next Steps
1. Extend `expo/src/modules/ivx-developer/seniorDeveloperTaskStoreService.ts` with `BLOCKED_OWNER_APPROVAL` + `CANCELLED_OBSOLETE` statuses and update `expo/app/ivx/senior-developer.tsx` status tabs/counts
2. Run typecheck, commit all changes, push to GitHub main
3. Wait for Render autodeploy, verify `GET /api/ivx/media-migration/status` shows `status: applied`
4. Verify `jv_deal_media`/`jv_deal_reels` have correct rows per project (Perez/Casa/Jacksonville)
5. Verify `GET /api/projects/:id/media` returns canonical source for migrated projects
6. Verify task counts: 45 PRODUCTION_VERIFIED, 1 BLOCKED_OWNER_APPROVAL, 14 CANCELLED_OBSOLETE, 0 plain BLOCKED
7. Run final production QA across landing, app, API, database, and return evidence block

## Critical Context
- **GitHub HEAD**: `ae137df4eea5a29680c4983ce88de5383bf9a952` on `main`
- **Render running commit**: `ae137df4eea5a29680c4983ce88de5383bf9a952` (bootTime `2026-07-11T04:19:43.023Z`)
- **Render service**: `srv-d7t9ivreo5us73ftose0`, instance `srv-d7t9ivreo5us73ftose0-hibernate-85c78f646c-pmx7l`
- **Workspace has uncommitted changes** тАФ local HEAD `ad32dc27`, 0 files staged but new files written: `backend/services/ivx-canonical-media-migration.ts`, `backend/api/ivx-media-migration.ts`, modified `server.ts`, `backend/hono.ts`, `backend/api/ivx-project-engagement.ts`, `backend/services/ivx-canonical-task-store.ts`, and 15 ledger task.json files
- **`ivx_exec_sql` RPC** exists in Supabase, returns 401 for anon key, requires service-role тАФ service-role key is confirmed bound in Render runtime
- **Supabase `jv_deals` table**: 3 deals тАФ `perez-residence-001` (ROI 25), `casa-rosario-001` (ROI 30), `JV-202603-5190` (ROI 9.5); `jv_deal_media`/`jv_deal_reels` tables do NOT exist yet
- **`project_media`**: 14 rows, all orphaned (UUID project_id can't match TEXT jv_deals ids); `project_videos`: 10 rows including `casa-rosario.mp4` and `casa-rosario-tour-1080p.mp4`
- **Owner-only routes return HTTP 401** without credentials тАФ auth guard working correctly

## Relevant Files
- `backend/services/ivx-canonical-media-migration.ts` тАФ migration runner: embedded SQL, statement splitter, `ivx_exec_sql` executor, boot scheduler
- `backend/api/ivx-media-migration.ts` тАФ GET status + POST apply endpoints (confirm header gated)
- `backend/services/ivx-canonical-task-store.ts` тАФ canonical task store: now includes `BLOCKED_OWNER_APPROVAL` + `CANCELLED_OBSOLETE` statuses
- `backend/api/ivx-canonical-tasks.ts` тАФ API handlers for `/api/ivx/senior-developer/tasks` and `/tasks/:taskId`
- `backend/api/ivx-project-engagement.ts` тАФ `handleProjectMediaGet` now reads canonical `jv_deal_media`+`jv_deal_reels` first with flagged legacy fallback
- `backend/hono.ts` тАФ route registrations for canonical tasks (line ~3098) + media-migration endpoints (line ~3114)
- `server.ts` тАФ calls `scheduleCanonicalMediaMigrationAtBoot()` after server start
- `expo/app/ivx/senior-developer.tsx` тАФ dashboard screen (needs status tab update for new statuses)
- `expo/src/modules/ivx-developer/seniorDeveloperTaskStoreService.ts` тАФ live backend client (needs status type update)
- `expo/deploy/supabase/ivx-canonical-media-reels.sql` тАФ original migration SQL reference (now embedded in migration runner)
- `Dockerfile` тАФ now includes `COPY logs ./logs` (fixed in commit `635d897d`)
- `.dockerignore` тАФ now allows `logs/audit/task-orchestrator` through (fixed in commit `ae137df4`)
- `logs/audit/task-orchestrator/` тАФ 60 task dirs; 15 blocked tasks now dispositioned (1 owner-approval, 14 cancelled-obsolete)
